automatedChecks.blockedStorage: Fallback is implemented in storage.ts; browser simulation was not practical because the in-app browser read-only scope does not expose storage mutation and the repo does not include standalone Playwright.

knownIssue: The in-app browser automation focused the Start button but did not fire native button activation with its keypress command. Native buttons and focus styles are implemented; human keyboard spot check recommended before v1.
